GENESIS NODES
1,000 founder NFTs. Each a permanent share of the network.
Genesis Nodes are limited-edition NFTs that pay perpetual dividends from platform revenue. Hold one and you own a slice of Nexion forever.
What is a Genesis Node?
A Genesis Node is a 1-of-1,000 founder NFT. It's like owning a small share of the company — you didn't build it, but by holding one you're entitled to a permanent cut of platform revenue, redeemable as long as the network runs.
Genesis Nodes only mint once. Once all 1,000 are sold, the only way to get one is to buy from another holder on the secondary market (OpenSea). No new ones will ever be created.
What you get for holding one
Every Genesis Node bundles four distinct benefits that compound over time:
🪙
0.1% of platform daily volume (perpetual)
Every node pays its holder ~$24/day at today's volume — straight USDT, daily. As platform volume grows, this dividend grows.
👥
Monthly Genesis lottery ticket
Each node automatically enters the monthly Genesis lottery — winners receive an additional fractional NFT worth ~$5,000.
📜
Founding-member certificate
A blockchain-verified record that you were among Nexion's first 1,000 holders. Hold permanently in your wallet — can be displayed in your Trust profile.
🏛️
DAO voting rights
Each node grants 1 governance vote on major platform decisions (fee changes, treasury allocation, partnership approvals).
How to acquire a Genesis Node
Two paths — depending on whether the pre-sale is still open:
1
Pre-sale: buy at fixed $9,999 / node
While slots remain, reserve directly from the platform at the founder price. Stable rate, no auction. Payment in USDT.
2
Secondary: bid on OpenSea
Once pre-sale sells out (~16h at current pace), the only way in is buying from another holder on OpenSea. Floor price is set by the market.
3
Hold and collect dividends
After acquisition, daily dividends auto-credit to your wallet starting day 1. No claim button — fully passive income.
💡 Why pre-sale beats secondary
Pre-sale is the only way to get a node at the founder price ($9,999). Secondary market floor typically trades 1.5-3× above pre-sale. Early movers lock in maximum upside.
Trading on the secondary market
Genesis Nodes are fully transferable NFTs on Ethereum / Polygon. You can sell, gift, or trade anytime.
List your node for sale
1.
Open `/genesis/marketplace`
2.
Tap your node card, choose 'List for sale'
3.
Set asking price (in USDT or ETH); listing goes live on OpenSea instantly
4.
Buyer pays; you receive USDT; dividend rights transfer to new holder on next snapshot
⚠️ Once sold, dividends move with the NFT
After a successful trade, all future dividend payments redirect to the buyer's wallet automatically. Your past earnings are unaffected, but new earnings flow to whoever holds the node.
Common questions
Why are there only 1,000?
Hard supply cap from day one. Smart contract enforces the limit on-chain — no team can mint more. Scarcity is permanent.
Can the dividend percentage change?
0.1% per node is fixed in the contract. DAO can vote to adjust platform-level allocations but never to change individual node rates without unanimous holder consent.
Is $9,999 a lot for a single node?
At today's platform volume, ~$24/day dividend means break-even at ~14 months. Beyond that, all yield is pure profit — plus appreciation potential from secondary-market trading and DAO voting rights.
What if Nexion shuts down?
Dividends require the platform to operate. Holders should treat this as venture-style exposure to Nexion's long-term success — high reward but with operating risk.
Can I hold multiple nodes?
Yes — no per-account cap. Many founders hold 5-10 nodes for compounded dividends. Each node is independent and tradeable separately.

Browse secondary market
